title: Trump heralds regime change, but Iran’s leaders remain hard-liners
summary_full: The president says Iran’s remaining leaders are more reasonable. But assassinations have left in place an emboldened government driving a hard bargain, officials say.
summary_public: The president says Iran’s remaining leaders are more reasonable. But assassinations have left in place an emboldened government driving a hard bargain, officials say.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump heralds regime change, but Iran’s leaders remain hard-liners
